hero.headline: Turn Every Rupee Into Measurable Revenue
hero.subheadline: Data-led paid media campaigns that deliver trackable ROI across Google, Meta, and beyond.

body: Performance marketing eliminates guesswork. Every campaign we run is tied to a specific outcome — leads, sales, app installs, or sign-ups. No vanity metrics.

We build full-funnel paid media strategies across Google Search, Google Display, Meta Ads, YouTube, and programmatic channels. Each channel is selected based on your audience's actual behaviour, not assumptions.
Our proprietary tracking setup ensures every conversion is attributed correctly, giving you complete clarity on what's working and what needs optimisation.

approach.title: Discovery & Audit
approach.description: We analyse your existing ad accounts, competitor landscape, and conversion funnel to identify gaps and opportunities before spending a rupee.

approach.title: Strategy & Channel Mix
approach.description: We build a channel-specific paid media plan aligned to your customer acquisition cost targets and lifetime value estimates.

approach.title: Campaign Build & Launch
approach.description: Structured ad sets, audience segmentation, creative variants, and landing page alignment — set up for maximum Quality Score and relevance.

approach.title: Optimisation Loops
approach.description: Weekly bid adjustments, A/B creative testing, and audience pruning based on performance signals.

approach.title: Reporting & Scaling
approach.description: Monthly performance reviews with clear revenue attribution. Budgets are scaled only when efficiency targets are met.

features.title: Google Search Ads
features.description: Capture high-intent buyers at the exact moment they're searching for what you sell.

features.title: Meta & Instagram Ads
features.description: Social-first campaigns built for awareness, consideration, and direct-response conversion.

features.title: YouTube Advertising
features.description: Video ad formats that drive brand recall and direct traffic at scale.

features.title: Programmatic Display
features.description: Precision audience targeting across millions of premium placements with real-time bidding.

features.title: Retargeting Funnels
features.description: Recover lost visitors and warm audiences with sequenced, intent-based ad flows.

features.title: Attribution & Analytics
features.description: Multi-touch attribution models that show the true value of every channel and touchpoint.

hero.title: Full revenue visibility
hero.description: See exactly which campaign, ad set, and keyword generated each conversion — down to the rupee.

list.title: No wasted budget
list.description: Negative keyword lists, audience exclusions, and dayparting eliminate low-value spend.

list.title: Scales with your business
list.description: Campaigns are structured to scale budget without sacrificing efficiency.

list.title: Brand-safe placements
list.description: All display and video placements are vetted through inclusion lists.

list.title: Rapid iteration
list.description: Creative and copy variants are tested and rotated on a 2-week cycle.

caseStudies.label: ROAS
caseStudies.context: Achieved within 90 days for an e-commerce client

caseStudies.label: CPA drop
caseStudies.context: After funnel restructure for a SaaS lead gen campaign

caseStudies.label: Monthly Impressions
caseStudies.context: Average reach for active performance accounts

caseStudies.label: CTR improvement
caseStudies.context: Post creative refresh across Meta campaigns

cta.headline: Ready to Make Every Click Count?
cta.supporting: Get a personalised performance audit with zero commitment.
